message:
fix: make ParseLabels idempotent - clear state before re-parsing (gt-nzrvk)

ParseLabels appended to bm.cc without clearing first. Multiple calls
(via IsQueueMessage, IsChannelMessage, IsDirectMessage, ToMessage)
accumulated duplicate CC entries. Reset all parsed fields at start.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
